content.intro: PropertyGoose allows you to quickly send emails to all tenants on a tenancy. This is useful for maintenance notices, rent reminders, or any other communications that need to reach everyone at the property.

sections.title: Sending an Email to All Tenants

steps.title: Open the tenancy
steps.content: Navigate to Tenancies and click on the tenancy whose tenants you want to email.

steps.title: Open the actions menu
steps.content: Click the three-dot menu button on the tenancy row.

steps.title: Select 'Email All Tenants'
steps.content: Click this option to open the email composer modal.

steps.title: Write your message
steps.content: Enter a subject line and compose your message. The property address will be automatically included.

steps.title: Send the email
steps.content: Click 'Send' to deliver the email to all active tenants on the tenancy.

sections.title: Who Receives the Email?
sections.content: Emails are sent to all tenants with 'active' status on the tenancy. Former tenants or those pending referencing will not receive the message.

sections.title: Email Records
sections.content: All emails sent through PropertyGoose are logged in the tenancy's activity history, providing a complete communication trail.

sections.title: Professional Communication
sections.content: Emails are sent from your agency's configured email address and include your branding, ensuring a professional appearance to tenants.
